gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (radeonsi, navi31, ACO, DRM 3.64, 6.17.9)
notes:
Game used to launch fine with CachyOS proton, then after coming back a few months later it no longer works with that or the GE-Proton I've been using for most other games.

I've had no luck with clearing my compat folders or other random proton versions people said "worked". I get kicked out after a few seconds by the ace anti-cheat before I reach the main menu.

Further notes:
- `gamemoderun` Was required for me to have the game even open before.
- `DXVK_FILTER_DEVICE_NAME="AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (RADV NAVI31)"` is just because I have a dual-gpu system and it might otherwise use the wrong one.
